```{=html}
<div style="width:88%;margin:0 auto;text-align:left;">

 <div style="position:relative;background:rgba(255,184,77,0.08);border-left:5px solid #FFB84D;border-radius:0 14px 14px 0;padding:1.4em 1.7em 1.5em;margin-bottom:1em;">
  <div style="position:absolute;top:0.4em;left:0.7em;font-family:'Georgia',serif;font-size:5em;color:#FFB84D;line-height:0.7;opacity:0.18;user-select:none;">"</div>
  <div style="position:relative;font-size:0.95em;line-height:1.55;color:#F8F7F0;font-style:italic;font-family:'Georgia','TsangerJinKai',serif;">
   <span style="color:#FFB84D;font-style:normal;font-weight:700;">Plausible</span> is not the same as <span style="color:#FFB84D;font-style:normal;font-weight:700;">correct</span>.
  </div>
  <div style="margin-top:0.7em;text-align:right;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#9B8EA0;">
   — the data-science gap
  </div>
 </div>

 <div style="display:flex;align-items:stretch;gap:0;border-radius:14px;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid rgba(248,247,240,0.15);">
  <div style="flex:1;background:rgba(248,247,240,0.04);padding:0.85em 1em;text-align:center;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.14em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.35em;">old</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.7em;color:rgba(248,247,240,0.55);font-style:italic;line-height:1.45;">"<span style="color:#9B8EA0;">Trust</span>, but verify."</div>
  </div>
  <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:rgba(248,247,240,0.06);padding:0 0.6em;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.85em;color:#FFB84D;font-weight:700;">→</div>
  </div>
  <div style="flex:1;background:rgba(255,184,77,0.12);padding:0.85em 1em;text-align:center;border-left:1px solid rgba(255,184,77,0.3);">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#FFB84D;letter-spacing:0.14em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.35em;">new</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.7em;color:#F8F7F0;font-style:italic;line-height:1.45;">"<span style="color:#FFB84D;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;">Verify</span>, then trust."</div>
  </div>
 </div>

</div>
```
